title: action.requested.v1
description: SPEC I (Wave I, AMD-03) — Action Platform envelope: an action has been REQUESTED (proposed) for execution. Registered in Apicurio as brain/action.requested.v1 (JSON Schema artifact under the FULL_TRANSITIVE rule, per AMD-03 R1, which enumerates action.*.v1 among the NEW program topics that get registry-registered JSON Schema — NOT Avro). Partition key = brand_id (tenant-first, I-S01). SCAFFOLD ONLY: no executor runs off this envelope — the executor adapters are NotImplemented and fail-closed behind per-executor flags (default OFF). GOVERNANCE (Wave-I gate precondition): execution_mode 'auto' is UNREACHABLE until a human-approved policy version + holdout support + a per-executor rollback implementation all exist; until then only 'suggest'/'approve' are meaningful. holdout_group is carried in the envelope from day one so incrementality is measurable the moment execution goes live. PII (I-S02): payload carries no raw email/phone/name/address; money in payload is bigint minor units + a sibling currency_code, never a float, never blended.

brand_id.description: Tenant key — brand_id-first on every event/key (I-S01). Also the Kafka partition key for this lane.

action_id.description: Stable id for this action across its whole lifecycle (requested → approved → executed | failed → rolled_back). Idempotency key = (brand_id, action_id).

decision_id.description: OPTIONAL back-reference to the gold_decisions row (Wave H) that selected this action — the road-taken link for audit. Null for actions not originated by the decision engine.

executor.description: Which executor adapter is targeted. MUST match an ExecutorPort adapter name in @brain/action-core; each is gated by its own platform flag (actions.executor.*, default OFF).

execution_mode.description: SPEC F/I — suggest (surface only) | approve (human approval required before execute) | auto (autonomous). Default 'suggest'. 'auto' is UNREACHABLE until the Wave-I governance gate is satisfied (approved policy version + holdout + per-executor rollback).

payload.description: Executor-specific instruction body (e.g. discount spec, audience delta, message template ref, webhook target). Money fields are bigint minor units + a sibling currency_code (never a float/blended). No raw PII (I-S02).

approved_by.description: OPTIONAL auth-principal user id of the human approver (audit, never raw PII). Absent at request time; present only once an approval has occurred.

holdout_group.description: OPTIONAL incrementality cohort label (e.g. 'holdout' | 'treatment' | a bucket id). Carried from day one so lift is measurable when execution goes live; null when no holdout applies.

occurred_at.description: OPTIONAL ISO-8601 UTC timestamp the request was raised.
